attributes.description: Alerts when checkpoint lag exceeds a threshold. Uses the Maximum statistic for worst-case lag. Rising checkpoint lag indicates the instance cannot keep up with write/redo volume.
attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] Checkpoint lag high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Checkpoint Lag High

### Triage
1. Check `WriteIOPS`/`WriteThroughput` for heavy write load.
2. Inspect `DiskQueueDepth` and storage latency — I/O bottlenecks delay checkpoints.
3. Review `CPUUtilization` on the instance.
4. Check `BinLogDiskUsage` if WAL/binlog volume is growing.

### Mitigation
- Reduce write burst or batch writes.
- Upgrade storage IOPS or instance class.
- Tune checkpoint-related engine parameters with care and testing.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/RDS"
    AND MetricName == "CheckpointLag"
    AND stat == "Maximum"
| STATS max_checkpoint_lag = MAX(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CheckpointLag`)
    BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region
// Lag in seconds — adjust per engine and workload (default: 60 s)
| WHERE max_checkpoint_lag > 60.0
| SORT max_checkpoint_lag DESC
